optionA.text: Notopodia with stout emergent hooks or spines

optionB.text: Notopodia without emergent hooks or spines

optionA.text: Dorsal and ventral cirri reduced or absent; parapodia reduced, body subcylindrical

optionB.text: Dorsal and ventral cirri well developed, parapodia well developed, body dorso-ventrally flattened

optionA.text: Antennae shorter than palps; integument papillated

optionB.text: Antennae longer than palps; integument smooth

optionA.text: Prostomial antennae present; parapodia sharply set off from body

optionB.text: Prostomial antennae absent; parapodia distinct, but not set off from body

optionA.text: Prostomial antennae and tentacular cirri absent

optionB.text: Prostomial antennae and tentacular cirri present

optionA.text: Prostomium with two antennae, biarticulate palps present

optionB.text: Prostomium with three antennae; palps without palpostyles
